title: Beehiiv vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv vs Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform fits your needs.
intro: Both Beehiiv and Moosend are popular freemium email marketing platforms with strong ratings, but they serve different audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers seeking monetization and growth features, while Moosend targets small businesses wanting affordable automation and unlimited sending. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right platform for your specific needs.
choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher interested in monetizing your audience through ads and sponsorships
You want advanced segmentation and a web reader for subscriber engagement
You value a newer platform (founded 2021) with growth-focused features and community
choose_b_if: You need the most affordable email marketing solution with paid plans starting at just $9
You want unlimited email sends and comprehensive automation workflows without restrictions
You're building landing pages and subscription forms as part of your email strategy

faq.a: Neither is universally "better"—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with monetization needs, while Moosend is superior for small businesses seeking affordable, unlimited email automation. Both have identical 4.7 G2 ratings, reflecting different strengths for different audiences.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, with paid plans starting at $9/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers versus Moosend's 1,000, which may delay the need for paid plans depending on your growth.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber lists and email campaigns between platforms, though the process requires manual export/import or API integration. Both platforms support standard email marketing data formats, making the transition feasible for most users.
